verdict.description: advance: clearly worth full analysis. reject: clearly non-viable or out of thesis. contested: real evidence pulls both ways. The forum convenes for advance and contested alike; the mechanical gate skips the room only on a reject verdict or a blank triage crux.

mismatches.description: Each thesis dimension the opportunity misses, one line each. Empty when in_scope.

missing_minimums.description: Inputs below the minimum bar (deck + company name). Missing minimums block advancement but are requests, not rejections.

evidence_ref.description: Signal id or claim location that grounds this flag. A flag without evidence is not a flag.

rationale.description: Two to four sentences. For reject: the kill reason, plainly. For contested: the two poles, named.
